channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fed Rate Outlook Becomes Uncertain Amid Middle East Tensions and Rising Oil Prices
item.description: Investors are confronting increased uncertainty regarding U.S. monetary policy as geopolitical tensions escalate in the Middle East. The Federal Reserve maintained interest rates at 3.50–3.75 per cent...

item.title: Key Takeaways from Trump's Recent Comments on Iran Negotiations, AI Misinformation, UK Relations, and Lebanon
item.description: In recent public appearances, President Donald Trump made several notable statements that highlight inconsistencies and potential misinformation influences in his decision-making process. Regarding Ir...

item.title: EFCC Arrests NDDC Staff and Pastor Kelechi Esimogu Over Alleged Contract Scam Involving Hundreds of Millions of Naira
item.description: Operatives of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) don arrest one Pastor Kelechi Benwosely Esimogu, wey be staff for Niger Delta Development Commission (NDDC) and also Group Pastor of P...

item.title: Three Suspected Shabu Peddlers with Ties to Dawlah Islamiya Remnants Arrested in Cotabato City Entrapment Operations
item.description: In Cotabato City, three longtime shabu dealers were arrested in separate police entrapment operations last March 17, 2026. The suspects—Jonard Lopez Valdevieso, Steve Ginta Kali, and Kominie Ombol Oma...

item.title: Government Urges Youth and Persons with Disabilities to Participate in Vision 2050 Opportunities
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, young people, particularly those living with disabilities, have been encouraged to make the most of opportunities that will come with the implementation of Tanzania's Vision 2050. Th...

item.title: Pastor Foluke Adeboye Reflects on Discarding Her Jewelry After Salvation
item.description: For those wey dey follow religious stories, Pastor Mrs Foluke Adeboye, wey be wife of the Redeemed Christian Church of God General Overseer Pastor E.A. Adeboye, don make people talk again after she re...

item.title: Tragic migrant boat incident off Comoros coast leaves at least eight dead, with death toll possibly higher
item.description: At least eight bodies were recovered from a migrant boat that washed up on the coast of Comoros, an Indian Ocean archipelago nation, with officials indicating the death toll could rise to as high as 1...

item.title: eThekwini invests R1.9 billion to develop Durban as Africa's superyacht hub
item.description: The eThekwini Municipality has announced a R1.9 billion investment to strengthen Durban’s position as a leading superyacht destination in Africa. The move follows a delegation’s visit to the Yachting ...

item.title: Government and Industry Leaders Discuss Policy Challenges and Collaboration for Industrial Growth in Tanzania
item.description: On March 17, 2026, during the Confederation of Tanzania Industries (CTI) leaders’ alignment and iftar networking session in Dar es Salaam, Deputy Minister for Industry and Trade, Mr Dennis Londo, reaf...

item.title: RCMP launches investigation at Edmonton-area medical supplier linked to AHS procurement lawsuit
item.description: Edmonton RCMP have initiated an investigation at a medical supplier implicated in a lawsuit involving Alberta Health Services (AHS). The action follows ongoing scrutiny of procurement practices at AHS...

item.title: A sceptic's day exploring London with an AI-planned itinerary
item.description: In the third instalment of his AI diary series for The Guardian, columnist Rhik Samadder, a self-described AI sceptic, decided to let ChatGPT plan an entire day out in London to rediscover hidden aspe...

item.title: Pakistan emphasises defensive nature of missile programme amid US concerns
item.description: ISLAMABAD – Pakistan's Foreign Office (FO) has firmly rejected claims made by US Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard regarding Pakistan’s missile capabilities. FO Spokesperson Tahir Hussai...

item.title: Multiple X Accounts Withheld in India Following Government Legal Orders
item.description: In a fresh instance of online content restriction, several accounts on the social media platform X have been made inaccessible in India starting from Wednesday. The affected profiles include parody ac...

item.title: Bruxism in adults: Causes, symptoms, risks and treatment options
item.description: According to Dr Stella Wanza, a dentist at Versatile Dental Solutions in Nairobi, about 50 per cent of her adult patients show varying degrees of teeth grinding, also known as bruxism. This condition ...

item.title: DarkSword iOS Exploit Chain Enables Rapid Data Theft from Vulnerable iPhones via Safari
item.description: A sophisticated iOS exploit chain named DarkSword has been identified by researchers from Google Threat Intelligence Group, Lookout, and iVerify. This JavaScript-based attack targets iPhones running o...

item.title: Tom McCartin’s free kick error hands Hawthorn a comeback win over Sydney
item.description: Sydney Swans defender Tom McCartin came under fire after a costly mistake in their clash against Hawthorn at the MCG. The 26-year-old conceded a free kick and 50-metre penalty after catching veteran J...

item.title: Significant Drop in Pakistan's International Flights Due to Middle East Airspace Restrictions
item.description: Pakistan's international aviation sector has faced a dramatic decline in outbound flights in early March 2026, with departures reducing from 1,127 flights between February 1-10 to just 572 flights dur...

item.title: Bank of England Holds Rates Amid Middle East Conflict as Inflation Risks Rise
item.description: The Bank of England (BoE) has announced that it will keep its base interest rate at 3.75%, as policymakers assess the potential inflationary impact of the escalating conflict in the Middle East. Gover...

item.title: Trump Claims US Had No Knowledge of Israeli Strike on Iran's South Pars Gas Field and Warns of Massive Retaliation if Iran Attacks Qatar Again
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated on Truth Social that Israel unilaterally struck a section of Iran's South Pars gas field, the world's largest natural gas reserve shared with Qatar, in response to ong...

item.title: NNL Announces Monthly Award Winners for December 2025 to February 2026
item.description: The Nigeria National League (NNL) has released the winners of their monthly awards covering December 2025, January 2026, and February 2026. In December 2025, Ajibola Joel of Stormers SC emerged as the...
